text:
Perfect! Now the code has comprehensive logging. When you refresh the portfolio, check the browser console and you'll see:

1. "✅ Processing Zapper tokens: X" - how many tokens Zapper returned
2. "Zapper total value: $X" - the total portfolio value
3. For each token: symbol, network, chainId, balance, balanceUSD, logo
4. "Zapper processing complete. Chains: X Total value: $X"
5. "📊 Final portfolio data:" - complete breakdown by chain

This will help us identify exactly where the issue is. The portfolio should now display all tokens with their logos from Zapper's CDN (`storage.googleapis.com/zapper-fi-assets/tokens/`).
